results.question: Show first record per patient
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM patients WHERE ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id ORDER BY created_at) = 1
results.sql_error: window functions are not allowed in WHERE clause

results.question: Find patients with above average visits
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM patients WHERE COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM visits)
results.sql_error: aggregate functions are not allowed in WHERE clause

results.question: Find records from last 90 days
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM records WHERE created_at > DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 90)

results.question: Get latest record per patient
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM records WHERE RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY patient_id ORDER BY date DESC) = 1
results.sql_error: window function in WHERE clause cannot be used

results.question: Count by month
results.generated_sql: SELECT MONTH(created_at), COUNT(*) FROM records GROUP BY 1

results.question: Find consecutive days with readings
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM readings WHERE date = LAG(date) + 1
results.sql_error: window functions are not allowed in WHERE clause for consecutive detection

results.question: Average age by category
results.generated_sql: SELECT category, AVG(age) FROM patients GROUP BY category

results.question: Join patients with visits
results.generated_sql: SELECT p.name, v.visit_date FROM patients p JOIN visits v ON p.id = v.patient_id

results.question: Filter active records
results.generated_sql: SELECT * FROM records WHERE is_active = TRUE
